# MCGym (Minecraft Environment) Requirements
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt

# Core dependencies
minecraft-data>=0.7.0  # Minecraft data access library

# MineStudio dependencies (from MineStudio/pyproject.toml)
av
opencv-python  # Note: Use opencv-python, NOT opencv-python-headless
setuptools
tqdm
numpy
requests
psutil  # Process monitoring utilities
ipython
typing
gymnasium>=0.26.0  # Maintained replacement for gym
gym3
# Note: MineStudio code still uses 'import gym', so we need gymnasium compatibility
# Install shimmy to make gymnasium work as gym
shimmy[gym-v21]>=0.2.1  # Provides backward compatibility layer
hydra_colorlog
hydra-core>=1.3.2
lmdb
wandb
torch>=2.3.1
lightning
scipy
rich
coloredlogs
daemoniker
lxml
cuda-python
diskcache
albumentations
einops
timm
transformers
Pyro4
xmltodict
pyrender==0.1.25
pyglet
imgui
pyopengl
ray
absl-py
dm-tree
x_transformers==0.27.1

# AIEvoBox core dependencies (if not already installed)
pydantic>=2.0.0
tortoise-orm
aiosqlite
pillow
pyyaml
pandas
matplotlib
openai
fastapi
uvicorn[standard]

# Additional dependencies (to resolve conflicts)
python-dotenv  # Required by environs
boto3  # Required by petrel-oss-sdk

# Required: Install MineStudio in development mode
# After installing the above dependencies, run:
# cd /mnt/shared-storage-user/leishanzhe/repo/AIEvoBox/env/mc/MineStudio && pip install -e .
